problem: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: Combining Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
